---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

[Download my CV (PDF)](files/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

# Education

-   B.S., Mechanical Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2021 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  Firm Cedarpoint , position operator , year 2022

2.  Firm Akcaylar, position salesclerk , year 2023

## Internships

1.  Firm Transvaro, position Intern , year 2023

2.  Firm Otest Bilter Center, position Intern year 2024

# Projects

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies

Motorcycles , BB , Dancing
